                                        expert care to keep your kids happy and healthy. Contact Now High-Quality Care Experienced doctors delivering expert, compassionate healthcare for women
                        and children. Advanced Technology Modern, well-equipped clinic ensuring accurate diagnosis and safe
                        treatments. Complete Family Healthcare Comprehensive Neonatology Paediatric Care and gynaecology services under one
                        trusted roof. Welcome to The Clinic Sure. Your family’s health and wellbeing are at the heart of everything we do. We are a trusted
                            multi-specialty clinic offering dedicated care in Neonatology Paediatric Care and
                            Gynaecology, led by
                            experienced specialists committed to providing personalised, compassionate, and
                            evidence-based healthcare for every stage of life. Our clinic is designed to offer a warm, welcoming, and patient-friendly environment where
                            you and your loved ones can feel truly cared for. From newborn care to women’s health, we
                            cover a wide range of services to support your family’s health needs under one roof. Dr. Seema Misra Neonatology Paediatric Care expert in child care, vaccinations, and illness management for infants to teens. Dr. Shashikala Hande Obstetric and Gynaecology expert in women’s health, antenatal care, and gynaecological wellness.                         More Caring for Women and Children, Every Step of the Way. At The Clinic Sure, we look after your family’s health with care and kindness. From child health
                        check-ups to women’s care and pregnancy support — we’re here for you. Book
                        An Appointment Our Doctors Meet Our Specialist Dr. Seema Misra MBBS(KGMC LKO) DNB( SGRH Delhi) Fellowship in Neonatology, Mayo Clinic, MN, USA Visiting consultant Apollo hospital Senior consultant Pediatrician and Neonatologist Dr. Shashikala Hande MBBS, MD(Obs and Gyne), MRCOG (UK). Senior consultant Apollo Cradle, Jayanagar. Worked in UK and Gulf Countries. Testimonials What Our Patients Say? A special thanks to my gynecologist Dr.Shashikala Handae. lam mother of two kids and both the kids were delivered by her. She handled it so well and guided us throughout pregnancy in both the cases.She is full of knowledge and has extensive experience in this field.she is highly supportive during consulting sessions. She is an amazing Doctor and a wonderful person. Lots of respect and regards to you. Nethrasre Dr.Shashikala Handae is our best Gynecologist. She always motivated my wife for normal delivery, encouraging and extremely welcoming. we are proud parents of 2 kids both the cases were normal delivery. Thank you Doctor for your throughout support. keep serving the way you are. Nanda Reddy Dr.Shashikala has been my gynecologist for many years.she is very professional and very easy to speak with. I feel very comfortable and she gives excellent medical care. Jyothi Dr.Shashikala Handae is an excellent Doctor, she is simple, superb human being, approachable, friendly with smiling face with her selfless service.Always amazing treatment. She is an extraordinary intelligent Doctor with human values. Jayanthimala We had a wonderful experience with Dr.Shashikala She explains every issue in detail and gives the right treatment. Our pregnancy journey went smooth with no complications under her care.she is always reachable on phone to discuss any issue. Many thanks to her for all her support and valuable guidence which ultimately landed us having a normal delivery. Sweta Anand Mam is not only an Excellent Doctor, she is a simple, superb Human being, Sober, approachable, friendly approach with a smiling face with her selfless service. Always amazing treatment. She is an extraordinarily intelligent Doctor with human values.Thanq mam for everything. Saranya We have been visiting Dr.Seema Misra for both our kids for almost 5 years
                            now. She is the
                            best paediatrician I have met so far in Bangalore and can diagnose the root cause of health
                            issues of kids. I am very pleased and would highly recommend her to any parent who request
                            for advice. Manikandan Bellan We have been visiting Dr. Seema Mishra at The Clinic Sure, BTM Layout since our daughter was a baby. She has truly become our go-to family doctor. Dr. Seema is extremely kind, patient, and always prescribes the most effective treatment. Her diagnosis has consistently been accurate, and her guidance has helped our daughter recover from various illnesses over the years.
I highly recommend this Clinic and Dr. Seema Mishra to anyone looking for a trustworthy and experienced doctor for their children. You’re in safe hands with her. Tanmay Kumar Mishra A wonderful experience with Dr. Seema Mishra. I have been taking my daughter to Dr. Seema for almost one year now. Her treatment works like magic for my baby always. May it be the time she was suffering from diarrhea or viral fever, cold cough. Doctor not only listens carefully but also explains everything in a way that puts me at ease. Grateful to have such a kind and trustworthy pediatrician looking after my little one’s health. Highly recommended! priti modi Dr. Seema Mishra has been the paediatrician for both our children from when
                            they were born. She is very good with children and tends to avoid medication unless
                            absolutely necessary. The only down-side, she is very popular and there is often quite a bit
                            of wait to see her. I strongly recommend. Harish Shivaram FAQ'S What services are available for children
                                at The Clinic Sure? We offer complete paediatric care including vaccinations, cough and fever treatment,
                                    growth and nutrition counselling, allergy management, behavioural and developmental
                                    assessments, and paediatric surgeries. How often should my child have a health
                                check-up? It’s recommended to have regular check-ups during infancy, early childhood, and
                                    adolescence to monitor growth, development, and overall health. Visit us for
                                    personalised advice based on your child’s age and needs. What gynaecology services do you
                                provide? We provide care for irregular periods, PCOS, menopause, fibroids, infertility,
                                    urinary infections, and other women’s health issues — along with routine check-ups
                                    and pregnancy care. When should I see a
                                gynaecologist? You should visit a gynaecologist if you experience irregular periods, heavy
                                    bleeding, pelvic pain, fertility concerns, or menopause symptoms. Regular wellness
                                    check-ups are also recommended. Do you offer vaccination services for
                                children? Yes, we provide complete vaccination and immunization programs for newborns,
                                    infants, and children as per recommended schedules. When should I schedule my first
                                prenatal visit? Ideally, your first prenatal check-up should be scheduled as soon as you confirm
                                    your pregnancy — typically between 6 to 8 weeks of gestation. Early care helps
                                    ensure a healthy pregnancy right from the start. What are common early pregnancy
                                symptoms? Common early pregnancy symptoms include missed periods, nausea, fatigue, breast
                                    tenderness, frequent urination, and mood changes. However, symptoms can vary from
                                    person to person. Is it safe to exercise during
                                pregnancy? Yes, moderate exercise like walking, prenatal yoga, or swimming is usually safe and
                                    beneficial during pregnancy. Always consult your doctor before starting or
                                    continuing any fitness routine. What foods should I avoid during
                                pregnancy? Avoid raw or undercooked meat, fish high in mercury (like shark or swordfish),
                                    unpasteurized dairy, and caffeine in large amounts. A balanced, nutritious diet is
                                    key for your baby’s development. What is adolescent consultation and
                                why is it important? Adolescent consultation focuses on the physical, emotional, and hormonal changes
                                    teens experience. It helps address concerns like puberty, menstrual issues, acne,
                                    mental health, and reproductive health — ensuring a healthy transition into
                                    adulthood. Where can I take my adolescent or teenager for consultation? Adolescents and teenagers should visit a pediatrician for any health concerns. Pediatric care covers all stages from infancy to adolescence, and our pediatricians are well-equipped to handle adolescent issues with the right expertise and sensitivity. When should a teenager see a doctor
                                for adolescent health concerns? Teenagers should see a doctor if they experience irregular periods, rapid weight
                                    changes, mood swings, delayed puberty, or concerns about body image or mental
                                    health. Regular check-ups also help with early detection and health education. Your family’s health and wellbeing are at the heart of everything we
                                do. stheclinicsure@gmail.com 080-7196 8388 #329, 8th Main 7th Cross Road, BTM 2nd Stage Behind Indus Diagnostic Center, Bangalore
                                Karnataka - 560076. Dr. Seema Misra stheclinicsure@gmail.com +91 96867 46789 Dr. Shashikala Hande stheclinicsure@gmail.com +91 70900 00277 Copyright 2025 The Clinic
